h3. *Background*
 * Configuration A uses sensor set S1
 * Configuration A cannot support feature F
 * Feature gating depends on sensor_config interface in the feature-coding layer, enabling F only when the 5-sensor variant is present

h3. *AS-IS*
 * State transition rules
 ** OFF -> FAIL (AND)
 *** system flag raised
 *** user mode OFF

h3. *TO-BE*
 * State transition rules
 ** OFF -> FAIL (AND)
 *** system flag raised
 *** user mode OFF
 *** {color:#de350b}extra_gating == enabled{color}



{color:#172b4d}Note: other transitions (e.g. OFF -> STANDBY) do not reference sensor config (mode stays OFF, so state stays OFF){color}
h3. *Source*
 * Internal spec v1.2
 * Design review notes - rev10

h3. *Plan*
 * Master event: project M1 ([proj_M1_spec|https://example.com/pages/proj-m1-spec])
 * Deploy target: per-version confirmation required
 ** (internal team reference)
 *** horizontal rollout across all variants

h3. *Impact*
 - Positive effect: feature availability aligned with hardware configuration
 - Negative effect: N/A


h3. *Tests*
 * unit tests pass
